About

Academic profile and institutional affiliation.

Biography

Assoc. Prof. Dr. Sait Ali UYMAZ is an academic at Konya Technical University. This biographical note is a concise placeholder for a fuller narrative of research, academic service, and professional contributions that can be updated as needed.

Research Interests

Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Metaheuristic Optimization, Artificial Algae Algorithm, Federated Learning, Semi-supervised Learning, Medical Image Segmentation, Data Science, Decision Support Systems, Industrial AI Applications.

Administrative Roles

  • Director, Artificial Intelligence Application and Research Center
  • Head, KTUN AI-Lab

These roles support interdisciplinary research activity through the Artificial Intelligence Application and Research Center and KTUN AI-Lab.

Academic Position

Associate Professor, Department of Computer Engineering, Konya Technical University
